p.c: function(x0: Real -> Real) { is_derivative_fn(x0, constant[Real, Real](a)) = derivative_pred(x0) }(pointwise_add[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant[Real, Real](a), identity_fn[Real]), constant[Real, Real](b)))
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Real](x)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Real](x)
identity_fn(x) * Real.1 != x
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.1 = x0 }[Real](identity_fn(x))
function[T0, T1: lib(add).Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], x)

goal: x * Real.1 + x * Real.1 = x + x

p.c: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real -> Real) { forall(x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x0, x2, x1(x2)) } = is_derivative_fn(x0, x1) }(square_real, pointwise_add[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]))

not is_derivative_fn(square_real, pointwise_add[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real])) or forall(x0: Real) { has_derivative_at(square_real, x0, pointwise_add(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], x0)) } = true

(forall(x0: Real) { not is_derivative_fn(square_real, pointwise_add[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real])) or has_derivative_at(square_real, x0, pointwise_add(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], x0)) })

not forall(x0: Real) { has_derivative_at(square_real, x0, pointwise_add(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], x0)) } or is_derivative_fn(square_real, pointwise_add[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]))

exists(k0: Real) { not has_derivative_at(square_real, k0, pointwise_add(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], k0)) } or is_derivative_fn(square_real, pointwise_add[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]))
not forall(x0: Real) { has_derivative_at(square_real, x0, pointwise_add(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], x0)) }
exists(k0: Real) { not has_derivative_at(square_real, k0, pointwise_add(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], k0)) }
exists(k0: Real) { not has_derivative_at(square_real, k0, pointwise_add(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], k0)) }
let w0: Real satisfy { not has_derivative_at(square_real, w0, pointwise_add(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], w0)) }
function(x0: Real) { has_derivative_at(square_real, x0, pointwise_add(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], x0)) }(w0)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { lib(real.derivative_basic).differentiable_at(x0, x1) } = differentiable_everywhere(x0) }(square_real)
